title: The Capability Workbench
description: Double-Diamond kanban with five Claude action kinds per card. Personal + team-shared boards.
speakerNotes: Headline: this is where the user spends their time. The five lanes are the design-thinking pipeline. The five Claude actions per card are the ideation engine.

title: Proof: did the model see it coming?
description: Backtest harness aggregate accuracy + per-event breakdown across COVID, ChatGPT, SVB, tariffs.
speakerNotes: Note for the speaker: the harness measures model propagation under shock, not historical reconstruction — say this explicitly so the buyer doesn't misread the claim.

title: Marketplace + multi-tenant
description: Three seller tiers, four listing types, team-attributed purchases via Clerk org.
speakerNotes: CEI is the moat, marketplace is the revenue mechanism. Take rates: 20/15/12 across the three tiers.

title: Next Steps
description: Three engagement paths: Quick Assessment, Deep-Dive Workshop, Platform License
